name: Declaratory Judgment for Tax-Exempt Bond Status

eligibility.description: Available only to the prospective issuer of the obligations after exhausting administrative remedies.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows prospective issuers of municipal bonds to obtain a Tax Court ruling on whether the interest on prospective obligations will be excludable from gross income under section 103(a).
